nodes.label: SQLite-backed Async Build Queue
nodes.rationale: SQLite chosen because it is already used in the project (existing pn-go-data volume), avoids adding a new infrastructure dependency. Max 2 concurrent workers to limit resource pressure on a VPS.

nodes.label: Deploy Build Pipeline
nodes.rationale: Auto-detects build method (Docker Compose > Dockerfile > Nixpacks) to minimize friction for end users. Nixpacks run via Docker image to avoid host install requirement.

nodes.label: AES-GCM Encryption for Tokens and Env Vars
nodes.norm_label: aes-gcm encryption for tokens and env vars

nodes.label: Build Cache Clear Button with Magic UI Terminal
nodes.norm_label: build cache clear button with magic ui terminal

nodes.label: SSE Stream for Build Cache Output
nodes.norm_label: sse stream for build cache output

nodes.label: Single-Admin Optional Authentication
nodes.rationale: Entirely opt-in design: if no admin account exists, the dashboard is fully open (backward compatible). Single admin row pattern keeps auth simple and matches self-hosted single-user use case.

nodes.label: httpOnly JWT Session Cookie (pn_session)
nodes.rationale: httpOnly + SameSite=Lax prevents JS-based token theft. 30-minute sliding window balances session security with usability.

nodes.label: Next.js Auth Middleware (middleware.ts)
nodes.rationale: Middleware placed in Next.js root to guard every page server-side before rendering. Sliding window is implemented by the middleware forwarding each page navigation to Go's /api/auth/status which refreshes the cookie.
